metadata.task_title: Capitalize the starting letter of every word in Word and add page numbers
metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 50.docx in Document > Task 50 folder, capitalize the first letter of every word in the title and add the page numbers
metadata.context: I am writing an article on Word and I want to modify the title format based on the guidelines.

l3.rationale: Move pointer over File Explorer Home.

l4.rationale: The user navigates through File Explorer from Home to Documents, opens the Task 50 folder, and launches Task ID 50.docx.

l5.rationale: Navigates through the folder hierarchy and confirms opening Task ID 50.docx.

l3.rationale: Move pointer into the document body.

l4.rationale: Inside the document, the user repeatedly moves the cursor, deletes lowercase letters, and types Shift+letter combinations to capitalize the title words.

l5.rationale: Covers the text edits and menu interactions used to change the title so each word starts with a capital letter.
